category_sources: Official GitHub README says Tagref manages cross-references in code and checks tags/references; source_facts.description matches this.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses "Tagref"; source_facts.name is tagref.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes usage, installation, and concepts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/stepchowfun/tagref; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes the CLI command, tag/reference checking, CI usage, and repository topics include linter/cross-reference/continuous-integration.
